title: Innovative Silky Russian Noodles
description: A fresh and adventurous Russian dish featuring brown rice noodles and pickles, perfect for those who prefer no onion or garlic in their meals. This dish is a unique twist on traditional Russian cuisine.
instructions: Cook the brown rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine the chopped pickles, sliced smoked salmon, and chopped fresh dill.
In a small bowl, whisk together the sour cream and lemon juice until smooth.
Add the cooked noodles to the bowl with the pickle and salmon mixture, and toss to combine.
Pour the sour cream mixture over the noodles and toss to coat.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional chopped fresh dill if desired.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 24 hours.
Reheat gently before serving if desired.
